More than 25 million U.S. seniors can no longer safely care for their feet, contributing to over $38 billion in avoidable medical costs each year.<br><br>Belle trains and deploys a network of Community Health Workers â known as Belle Technicians â to deliver in-home foot exams, preventive care, and care management. Backed by advanced data science, our care model detects emerging health risks early, often before they escalate. When issues arise, our telehealth team and nurses coordinate follow-up care and take action.<br><br>The result? Belle delivers clinical outcomes on par with blockbuster drugs, without a single pill. Our model helps prevent complications, reduce hospital visits, and improve quality of life â all with care that people genuinely love.<br><br>Our mission: Bring Joy to Healthcare. Join us if our cause inspires you!<br><br><strong>About This Role<br><br></strong>As an Operations Supervisor in South Georgia, you'll drive growth, build a strong team, and create community impact in your designated market. This role blends recruitment, market development, and operational excellence, ensuring seniors receive life-changing in-home care.<br><br>You'll be actively engaged in technician development, field shadowing, performance reviews, and issue resolution. You'll also collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to ensure every appointment is delivered with consistency, professionalism, and warmth.<br><br>You will also serve as the local face of the company â building trust with your team, ensuring quality standards are met, and collaborating cross-functionally to help Belle scale successfully.
